title: FLOSS Weekly 529: Teleport and Gravity
summary:
Teleport is a modern security gateway for remotely accessing Clusters of Linux servers and Kubernetes clusters. It is intended to be used instead or together with sshd for organizations who need Kubernetes API access with an audio and recording/replay, SSH audit with session recording/replay, and more.
Gravity is an upstream Kubernetes packaging solution that takes the drama out of on-premises deployments.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
